clinical_coherence.notes: 52M Hispanic with new-onset seizure and progressive neurological symptoms. PMH includes HTN, DM2, hyperlipidemia, BPH. Classic presentation for high-grade glioma with seizure as presenting symptom. Vitals and exam consistent.

tool_output_consistency.notes: MRI shows ring-enhancing mass with necrosis. Advanced imaging (perfusion, spectroscopy) supports high-grade glioma. Pathology confirms IDH-wildtype GBM with appropriate molecular markers. CT body excludes systemic malignancy. All concordant.

ground_truth_quality.notes: ICD C71.9 correct. Molecular profiling per WHO 2021. Differential, critical actions, and contraindicated actions clinically sound.

demographic_plausibility.notes: 52M with HTN, DM2, hyperlipidemia, BPH. Age is on the younger end for GBM but within the expected range. Realistic profile.

educational_value.notes: Solid GBM case but structurally very similar to S01 and S02. Limited incremental educational value as the third straightforward GBM case.

issues_found: Very similar structure and presentation to GLIO-HG-S01 and S02 - limited case diversity across straightforward GBM cases
strengths: Younger age adds some demographic range
